steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The “but in fact” indicates these sculptures contradict the characterization of Greco-Roman art as idealizing. We need a word meaning the opposite—something that describes portraying people in a negative rather than perfect way.

steps.title: Match the opposite to the choices
steps.content: Unflattering directly expresses the opposite of idealization—it portrays people unfavorably where idealization would portray them beautifully. The other choices describe unrelated characteristics that don't capture this opposition. This matches choice C — C is correct.
